subject: Northstar security materials and onboarding timing
bodyMarkdown:
Hi Renee and Victor,

We’ll send the approved security materials now and confirm BAA timing before finalizing the kickoff date.

We will include admin audit logs for configured workflow actions in the deployment scope. Victor, once you send the procurement portal link by Tuesday, May 19, our team will upload the approved packet and track any remaining items.

We will also align the kickoff date to the SOW once security approval, BAA execution, and PO are complete.

Best,
Omar

intendedClaims.text: We’ll send the approved security materials now and confirm BAA timing before finalizing the kickoff date.
We will include admin audit logs for configured workflow actions in the deployment scope.
We will also align the kickoff date to the SOW once security approval, BAA execution, and PO are complete.
